rooms.title: Collapsed Test Wing

objects.text: A maintenance seal still answers your crest. You can stabilize your mana here.
Mira's ribbon is caught in the broken railing. She made it this far... and kept moving upward.
Residual magic hums in a looping rhythm. The labyrinth is listening to which spell you favor.

rooms.entry_text: The fall should have killed the exam. Instead, the labyrinth seals the breach and leaves one corridor lit above you.

rooms.title: Resonance Conduit

objects.text: Record fragment: 'Upper channel restoration initiated.' The same line repeats, but each glyph angles downward.

rooms.entry_text: The conduit answers your spells. Every surge that should lift rubble aside instead rotates the corridor below your feet.

rooms.title: Deep Alignment Gate

objects.text: Your own footsteps answer a fraction too late. The maze is rehearsing you.
A wall inscription stops mid-sentence: 'The path to the surface is now...' The last word is scratched into a spiral.

rooms.entry_text: The chamber claims to be an ascent lock. Yet the air grows colder, older, and far heavier than the floors above.
